description:
The same test helper struct and function are copy-pasted across 10+ test modules:

EnvVarGuard + env_lock() — 6 copies in daemon modules alone:
- daemon_events.rs, daemon_run.rs, daemon_scheduler.rs
- daemon_scheduler_git_ops.rs, daemon_scheduler_project_tick.rs, daemon_notifications.rs

Plus copies in other crates:
- agent-runner/runner/event_persistence.rs, agent-runner/sandbox/env_sanitizer.rs
- orchestrator-cli/shared/runner.rs
- llm-cli-wrapper/tests/e2e_wrapper_matrix.rs

Solution: Create a shared #[cfg(test)] test-utils module (in orchestrator-core or a new test-utils crate) with EnvVarGuard and env_lock. Import everywhere.
title: Extract shared test utilities (EnvVarGuard copied 6+ times across crates)
